description: Momentary push button — hold to close contact

grid.css: border-radius: 8px 0 0 8px; background: #4A90E2; border: 2px solid #2563EB; border-right: none; color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

border-radius: 0; background: #6B7280; border: 2px solid #4B5563; border-left: none; border-right: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold;

border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; background: #E24A4A; border: 2px solid #DC2626; border-left: none; color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
